message:
Update beads issue tracker: expand mailbox durability subtree with
13 new tasks and refine existing recovery/supervisor issues

The br-97gc6.5.2 (DB/storage audit) subtree now has 39 updated issue
records (up from 26). New issues cover additional dimensions of the
autonomous mailbox durability program including:

- Recovery admission control, backoff, and loop suppression
- Supervisor state-machine edge cases and escalation thresholds
- Archive-first rebuild strategies and validation checkpoints
- Forensic capture improvements for post-mortem analysis
- Operator-invisible degradation and graceful fallback paths

All new issues are in "open" status, correctly parented under the
existing br-97gc6.5.2.* hierarchy with proper dependency links.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
